title: Rich Creamy Hummus Stir-fry
description: A rich and creamy Thai-inspired dish featuring hummus that serves as a delicious hangover cure, perfect for any meal.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup heavy cream
ingredients.notes: Can be replaced with coconut milk for a dairy-free option

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon soy sauce (optional)
ingredients.notes: For added umami flavor, can omit

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons olive oil
ingredients.notes: Can be replaced with avocado oil for a healthier option

instructions: In a blender, combine chickpeas, tahini, lemon juice, garlic, and heavy cream. Blend until smooth.
Season with soy sauce (if using), salt, and pepper to taste. Pour into a bowl and mix well.
Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add mixture from blender and cook for about 2 minutes or until heated through.
Stir occasionally to prevent burning and add fresh herbs for garnish before serving.
